description_long: This object consists of four modern smartphones, each with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The devices feature large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreens on the front, with minimal bezels and a small notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The backs of the phones display a prominent Apple logo and dual camera modules arranged in the top left corner, each with a slight camera bump. The phones are shown in four distinct colors: red, white, blue, and black, each with a metallic or glossy finish on the sides and back. Physical buttons are visible along the sides, including volume controls and a power button, with small holes for speakers and charging ports at the bottom. The overall design is slim, compact, and highly refined, typical of premium consumer smartphones intended for everyday urban use.
description: A group of four modern Apple smartphones in red, white, blue, and black, featuring large glass screens, dual rear cameras, and sleek metallic finishes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profiles and colored metallic edges of the four phones, with visible camera bumps and button placements.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large, edge-to-edge screens with colorful abstract wallpapers and minimal bezels, highlighting the notches at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the camera bumps and metallic finishes, with button placements and SIM tray slots visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the Apple logos and dual camera modules in the top left corners, with each phone's distinct color clearly visible.
attribute_brand_logo: Each phone has a silver Apple logo centered on the back panel, clearly visible and reflective.
attribute_screen_display_content: Each screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and pink gradients, and a black notch at the top; no app icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Each phone has a dual camera module located in the top left corner on the back, arranged diagonally with a small flash beside the lenses and a slight camera bump.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the sides: a power button on the right edge, and two volume buttons plus a mute switch on the left edge; all are slim and rectangular.
